care.summary: A charming clustering cactus with many finger-like cylindrical stems covered in golden-yellow spines.
care.light: Bright direct sunlight; needs at least 6 hours of sun daily
care.water: Water sparingly when soil is completely dry; every 2-4 weeks in summer, nearly dry in winter
care.soil: Very well-draining cactus mix with pumice and coarse sand
care.fertilizer: Dilute cactus fertilizer once in spring and once in mid-summer
common_issues: Root rot from overwatering — let soil dry completely
Etiolation (thin, weak growth) from insufficient sunlight
Sunburn if moved abruptly from low to high light
tips: Use a very gritty, mineral-based soil mix
Water only when the soil has been bone-dry for several days
Place in the sunniest window available (south or west facing)
Handle with thick gloves — spines are sharp and hard to see
